Analytics.Dimension.description: A property holding the key of a dimension in an analytical context

Analytics.Measure.description: A property holding the numeric value of a measure in an analytical context

Analytics.AccumulativeMeasure.description: The measure has non-negative and additive values; it can be used in whole-part charts, e.g. the Donut

Analytics.RolledUpPropertyCount.description: Number of properties in the entity instance that have been aggregated away

Analytics.AggregatedProperties.description: Dynamic properties for aggregate expressions with specified aggregation method defined on the annotated entity type.

Analytics.AggregatedProperty.description: Dynamic property for aggregate expression with specified aggregation method defined on the annotated entity type.

Analytics.AnalyticalContext.description: Collection of properties that define an analytical context

Analytics.LevelInformation.description: Information about grouping levels in the result set of a request including the [`MultiLevelExpand`](#MultiLevelExpand) transformation

CodeList.CurrencyCodes.description: An entity set containing the code list for currencies

CodeList.UnitsOfMeasure.description: An entity set containing the code list for units of measure

CodeList.ExternalCode.description: Property containing code values that can be used for visualization

CodeList.IsConfigurationDeprecationCode.description: Property contains a Configuration Deprecation Code

CodeList.CodeListSource.description: Complex type with properties: Url:Edm.String, CollectionPath:Edm.String

Common.ServiceVersion.description: 1 for first version of a service, incremented when schema changes incompatibly and service is published with a different URI

Common.ServiceSchemaVersion.description: 0 for first schema version within a service version, incremented when schema changes compatibly

Common.Label.description: A short, human-readable text suitable for labels and captions in UIs

Common.Heading.description: A short, human-readable text suitable for column headings in UIs

Common.QuickInfo.description: A short, human-readable text suitable for tool tips in UIs

Common.DocumentationRef.description: A URI referencing language-dependent documentation for the annotated model element

Common.Text.description: A descriptive text for values of the annotated property. Value MUST be a dynamic expression when used as metadata annotation.

Common.TextFor.description: The annotated property contains a descriptive text for values of the referenced property.

Common.ExternalID.description: A human readable identifier for values of the annotated property or parameter. Value MUST be a dynamic expression when used as metadata annotation.

Common.IsLanguageIdentifier.description: An identifier to distinguish multiple texts in different languages for the same entity

Common.TextFormat.description: The annotated property, parameter, or return type contains human-readable text that may contain formatting information

Common.Timezone.description: The point in time represented by the annotated property or parameter shall be interpreted in the given time zone

Common.IsTimezone.description: Annotated property or parameter is a time zone

Common.IsCurrency.description: Annotated property or parameter is a currency code

Common.IsUnit.description: Annotated property or parameter is a unit of measure

Common.UnitSpecificScale.description: The number of fractional decimal digits of a currency amount or measured quantity

Common.UnitSpecificPrecision.description: The number of significant decimal digits of a currency amount or measured quantity

Common.SecondaryKey.description: The listed properties form a secondary key

Common.MinOccurs.description: The annotated set or collection contains at least this number of items

Common.MaxOccurs.description: The annotated set or collection contains at most this number of items

Common.MaskedValue.description: Property contains sensitive data that is by default not transferred

Common.RevealOnDemand.description: Unmasked data for this property can be requested with custom query option `masked-values=false`

Common.SemanticObject.description: Name of the Semantic Object represented as this entity type or identified by this property

Common.SemanticObjectMapping.description: Maps properties of the annotated entity type or sibling properties of the annotated property to properties of the Semantic Object

Common.SemanticObjectUnavailableActions.description: List of actions that are not available in the current state of the instance of the Semantic Object

Common.IsInstanceAnnotation.description: Term can also be used as instance annotation; AppliesTo of this term specifies where it can be applied

Common.FilterExpressionRestrictions.description: These properties only allow a subset of expressions

Common.FieldControl.description: Control state of a property, parameter, or the media stream of a media entity

Common.longtextUrl.description: Location of the message long text

Common.numericSeverity.description: Classifies an end-user message as info, success, warning, or error

Common.MaximumNumericMessageSeverity.description: The maximum severity of all end-user messages attached to an entity, null if no messages are attached

Common.IsActionCritical.description: Criticality of the function or action to enforce a warning or similar before it's executed

Common.Attributes.description: Attributes related to this property, which may occur in denormalized entity types

Common.RelatedRecursiveHierarchy.description: A recursive hierarchy related to this property. The annotation path must end in Aggregation.RecursiveHierarchy.

Common.Interval.description: An interval with lower and upper boundaries described by two properties

Common.SAPObjectNodeType.description: The SAP Object Node Type represented by the annotated entity type

Common.Composition.description: The annotated navigation property represents a logical composition, even though it is non-containment

Common.SAPObjectNodeTypeReference.description: The entity referenced by the annotated property has the [`SAPObjectNodeType`](#SAPObjectNodeType) with this name

Common.IsNaturalPerson.description: The annotated entity type (e.g. `Employee`) or annotation (e.g. `IsImageUrl`) represents a natural person

Common.ValueList.description: Specifies how to get a list of acceptable values for a property or parameter

Common.ValueListRelevantQualifiers.description: List of qualifiers of relevant ValueList annotations

Common.ValueListWithFixedValues.description: If specified as true, there's only one value list mapping and its value list consists of a small number of fixed values

Common.ValueListShowValuesImmediately.description: A value list with a very small number of fixed values, can decide to show all values immediately

Common.ValueListForValidation.description: Contains the qualifier of the ValueList or ValueListMapping that should be used for validation

Common.ValueListReferences.description: A list of URLs of CSDL documents containing value list mappings for this parameter or property

Common.ValueListMapping.description: Specifies the mapping between data service properties and value list properties

Common.IsFiscalYearVariant.description: Property encodes a fiscal year variant

Common.MutuallyExclusiveTerm.description: Only one term of the group identified with the Qualifier attribute can be applied

Common.DraftActivationVia.description: Draft entities in this set are indirectly activated via draft entities in the referenced entity set

Common.EditableFieldFor.description: The annotated property is an editable field for the referenced key property

Common.SemanticKey.description: The listed properties form the semantic key, i.e. they are unique modulo IsActiveEntity

Common.FilterDefaultValue.description: A default value for the property to be used in filter expressions.

Common.FilterDefaultValueHigh.description: A default upper limit for the property to be used in 'less than or equal' filter expressions.

Common.OriginalProtocolVersion.description: Original protocol version of a converted (V4) CSDL document, allowed values `2.0` and `3.0`

UI.HeaderInfo.description: Information for the header area of an entity representation. HeaderInfo is mandatory for main entity types of the model

UI.Identification.description: Collection of fields identifying the object

UI.Badge.description: Information usually displayed in the form of a business card

UI.LineItem.description: Collection of data fields for representation in a table or list

UI.StatusInfo.description: Collection of data fields describing the status of an entity

UI.FieldGroup.description: Group of fields with an optional label

UI.ConnectedFields.description: Group of semantically connected fields with a representation template and an optional label

UI.MediaResource.description: Properties that describe a media resource

UI.DataPoint.description: Visualization of a single point of data, typically a number; may also be textual, e.g. a status value

UI.ValueCriticality.description: Assign criticalities to primitive values. This information can be used for semantic coloring.

UI.SelectionFields.description: Properties that might be relevant for filtering a collection of entities of this type

UI.HeaderFacets.description: Facets for additional object header information

UI.QuickViewFacets.description: Facets that may be used for a quick overview of the object

UI.QuickCreateFacets.description: Facets that may be used for a (quick) create of the object

UI.FilterFacets.description: Facets that reference UI.FieldGroup annotations to group filterable fields

UI.OperationParameterFacets.description: Facets that reference UI.FieldGroup annotations to group action or function parameters

UI.ThingPerspective.description: The annotated term is a Thing Perspective

UI.IsSummary.description: This Facet and all included Facets are the summary of the thing. At most one Facet of a thing can be tagged with this term

UI.PartOfPreview.description: This record and all included structural elements are part of the Thing preview

UI.Map.description: Target MUST reference a UI.GeoLocation, Communication.Address or a collection of these

UI.IsImageURL.description: Properties and terms annotated with this term MUST contain a valid URL referencing an resource with a MIME type image

UI.IsImage.description: Properties annotated with this term MUST be a stream property annotated with a MIME type image. Entity types annotated with this term MUST be a media entity type annotated with a MIME type image.

UI.MultiLineText.description: Properties and parameters annotated with this annotation should be rendered as multi-line text (e.g. text area)

UI.Placeholder.description: A short, human-readable text that gives a hint or an example to help the user with data entry

UI.InputMask.description: Properties or parameters annotated with this term will get a mask in edit mode

UI.TextArrangement.description: Describes the arrangement of a code or ID value and its text

UI.DateTimeStyle.description: The temporal value represented by the annotated property or parameter shall be shown on the UI in the given style

UI.Note.description: Visualization of a note attached to an entity

UI.Importance.description: Expresses the importance of e.g. a DataField or an annotation

UI.Hidden.description: Properties or facets (see UI.Facet) annotated with this term will not be rendered if the annotation evaluates to true.

UI.IsCopyAction.description: The annotated [`DataFieldForAction`](#DataFieldForAction) record references an action that deep-copies an instance of the annotated entity type

UI.IsAIOperation.description: The annotated operation is powered by AI

UI.CreateHidden.description: EntitySets annotated with this term can control the visibility of the Create operation dynamically

UI.UpdateHidden.description: EntitySets annotated with this term can control the visibility of the Edit/Save operation dynamically

UI.DeleteHidden.description: EntitySets annotated with this term can control the visibility of the Delete operation dynamically

UI.HiddenFilter.description: Properties annotated with this term will not be rendered as filter criteria if the annotation evaluates to true.

UI.AdaptationHidden.description: Properties or entities annotated with this term can't be used for UI adaptation/configuration/personalization

UI.DataFieldDefault.description: Default representation of a property as a datafield, e.g. when the property is added as a table column or form field via personalization

UI.CriticalityCalculation.description: Parameters for client-calculated criticality, alternative to UI.Criticality

UI.Emphasized.description: Highlight something that is of special interest

UI.OrderBy.description: Sort by the referenced property instead of by the annotated property

UI.ParameterDefaultValue.description: Define default values for action parameters

UI.RecommendationState.description: Indicates whether a field contains or has a recommended value

UI.RecommendationList.description: Specifies how to get a list of recommended values for a property or parameter

UI.ExcludeFromNavigationContext.description: The contents of this property must not be propagated to the app-to-app navigation context

UI.DoNotCheckScaleOfMeasuredQuantity.description: Do not check the number of fractional digits of the annotated measured quantity

UI.LeadingEntitySet.description: The referenced entity set is the preferred starting point for UIs using this service
